uses.rightsBasisEvidence: The lesson independently derives and expresses the function, composition, graph-feature, average-rate, and transformation relations. No standards wording, examples, tables, or figures are reused.

agentAccess.notes: The official landing page and linked standards file were accessible without login or paywall. Published terms and public-license pages showed no AI-specific restriction.

sources.title: NIST Guide to the SI, Chapter 7: Rules and Style Conventions for Expressing Values of Quantities
creators: National Institute of Standards and Technology
sources.publisher: National Institute of Standards and Technology
sources.version: Web presentation modified 2025-08-18; based on NIST Special Publication 811
sources.locator: Section 7.1 on unambiguous graph-axis and table-heading labels for quantity values
sources.license: NIST Technical Series/public information under NIST Copyrights & Disclaimers and technical-series licensing statements, subject to attribution and third-party exceptions

uses.rightsBasisEvidence: The lesson uses only the factual role of explicit quantity and unit labels. No NIST figure, table, wording, or example is reused.

agentAccess.notes: NIST rights, technical-series licensing, and robots routes were checked before access; no agent restriction or access barrier was found.
